divergence: Dreams became taxable and the audits happen while you sleep
story_angle: deadpan report of a catastrophe that everyone involved considers a great success
headline: Inverted Pyramid Cluster Files 100% Tax Compliance After Daring Sleep-Audit Strikes
deck: Locals report seeing faces disappear as their dreams are seized by corporate authorities.
article:
The Vem Tax Authority completed its quarterly sweep of the Inverted Pyramid Cluster by auditing residents during sleep, securing full compliance. Using sleep-seal devices, auditors extracted revenue from subconscious earnings.

"We must commend K't, who confidently rotated to audit mode three seconds before their deletion, showcasing the kind of initiative we expect in our taxpaying population," stated Z'Pax, Chief Compliance Officer of the Vem Tax Authority. Over 12,000 segments went non-responsive, yet officials recorded them as collected.

Pyramids now bear tax authority glyphs. "I thought it was just another night of sleep, but it turns out I’m a revenue line item now," lamented Shh't, a long-time resident of the Sable Reach. Speculation grows that future audits will expand without the participants.
author: Z'Krell Dreamnums, Senior Dream Tax Correspondent

oped.title: Seize the Slumber: Why Dream Audits Are Society’s Greatest Gift
oped.author: Lord Percival Nightwhinge, PhD in Moral Somnology and Lifetime Corporate Dream Consultant
oped.body: The Inverted Pyramid Cluster’s flawless 100% compliance proves that sleep-audits are not oppression but overdue hygiene for the subconscious. These malcontents whining about vanishing faces simply refuse to dream fiscally responsible content; had they filled their REM cycles with approved jingles instead of subversive adventures, their visages would remain intact. I, for one, have never lost a facial feature because my nightly visions consist solely of balanced ledgers and loyalty oaths. The real scandal is that some citizens still hoard untaxed whimsy while the rest of us subsidize their laziness through higher neural tariffs. Rather than complain, we should expand the program to daytime reveries and mandate corporate product placement in every nightmare. Anything less rewards the hatless dreamers who clearly brought this upon themselves by refusing to purchase the official Audit-Proof Pillow Liner.

classifieds.text: Selling my last un-audited lucid rig after Inverted Pyramid sleep-strike wiped every profit fantasy; faces already fading, must offload before they repo my REM.
Urgent: need one dream smuggler for black-market sleep shifts to beat the new 100% compliance audits—neural credits paid nightly, my vanishing face on the line.
Lost: entire identity and three backup faces during last night's corporate dream-seizure in the Pyramid Cluster. Reward: whatever taxable scraps remain.
To the net-diver whose audited dreams I reported—apologies, the tax algorithms took my remorse along with your face. Still dreaming of forgiveness in the residual static.

panels.caption: Inverted Pyramid's audit drones file 100% compliance while the cluster sleeps.
A citizen jolts awake: "My face— they took it as unreported dream revenue."
"Correct," drones the auditor. "Your replacement face is now taxable property."

joke.setup: The Inverted Pyramid Cluster hit 100% tax compliance after the sleep-audits hit their stacks.
joke.punchline: Turns out when the auditors jack straight into your wetware at 0300, even your subconscious stops claiming the neural side-gigs as 'intangible assets.'
joke.text: The Inverted Pyramid Cluster hit 100% tax compliance after the sleep-audits hit their stacks. Turns out when the auditors jack straight into your wetware at 0300, even your subconscious stops claiming the neural side-gigs as 'intangible assets.'

sponsor_ads.body: Replicate the Inverted Cluster’s 100 % filing streak with our pre-audited REM firmware; auditors finish their work before you finish your first REM cycle.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Side effects may include permanently gray dreams.

sponsor_ads.headline: Oneiric Write-Off Implant v4.7
sponsor_ads.body: Declare your nightmares as business losses while you sleep; the Bureau’s strike teams now accept itemized receipts delivered directly to the limbic node.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Not responsible for audits that bill you for the audit itself.

sponsor_ads.body: Syncs every nocturnal plot thread to the Inverted Pyramid’s approved templates so your next sleep-audit arrives already stamped compliant.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Failure to link voids the warranty and your REM quota.

sponsor_ads.headline: Lucid Windfall Hotline – 24/7 Cortex Edition
sponsor_ads.body: Report taxable epiphanies mid-dream before the strike teams do it for you; operators are themselves asleep and fully deductible.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Calls may be monitored for revenue enhancement.

stories.headline: Non-Compliant Dreamers Reassigned to Lower Pyramids After Faces Seized in Audit Sweep
stories.deck: Consensus votes now require visible shell segments to participate in nightly rearrangements.
stories.article:
Segmented residents in the Sable Reach cluster have adapted their dawn consensus meetings to accommodate the growing number of shell-bearers missing facial plates. These individuals, their dream assets claimed for tax arrears, now occupy the inverted structures' lower tiers where light filtration prevents any attempt at regeneration.

Reassignment protocols mandate that such beings vote only through vibrational signals recorded by overhead monitors. One affected unit previously designated Shh reported a 19 percent reduction in social access after its second audit cycle, with its remaining segments allocated to corporate reserve pools.

real_world_echo: US launches fresh strikes as Iran closes Strait of Hormuz — enforcement actions framed as necessary while the 'strait' (dream access) is forcibly closed
